subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, Who hath illumined the world through the Sun of the horizon of Hijaz and through the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از آفتاب افق حجاز عالم را منور نمود و از عرف
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @oneness; unity of religion
